event: Still life with meat, poultry, and vegetables
description: A kitchen still life showing an abundance of raw foodstuffs arranged before a window with a winter landscape visible outside. Hanging game birds and cuts of red meat dominate the upper portion. In the foreground, heads of cabbage, tomatoes, and other green vegetables are spread across a surface. A dead hare or rabbit lies to the left. The colors are rich and earthy, with greens of the cabbages contrasting against the reds and browns of the meat. The window in the background lets in cool winter light.

_meta.title: Still Life. Meat, poultry and brussels sprouts against the window.
